purpose: Full iftar table spread with dates, water, traditional and modern Saudi dishes. Auto-triggers during Ramadan.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Warm Ramadan iftar table photography showing traditional Saudi iftar spread with dates and water cups at center, vimto in glasses, samosas, harees, kabsa with lamb, {featured_dish}, traditional brass dallah coffee pot, warm tungsten ambient interior lighting, soft golden-hour quality suggesting just-after-sunset, no people, top-down or 45-degree angle, hyper-realistic food and brassware detail, shot on 35mm at f/5.6, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: all. Source code in research corpus: F03. Saudi adaptation guidance: Critical: just-after-sunset lighting essential (pre-sunset suggests breaking fast early — religiously incorrect). Featured dish varies by brand region. Auto-triggers during ramadan_active. Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: 2-3 per week during Ramadan. Compliance level: elevated.
